name: Advance America
description_short: Claymont's Advance America at 2720 Philadelphia Pike offers payday and title loans with same-day funding available.
description_long:
The Advance America branch at 2720 Philadelphia Pike in Claymont, DE is a standalone storefront open Mon-Fri 10AM-6PM and Sat 10AM-1PM, closed Sundays. This location serves Claymont residents and the surrounding area with quick access to payday and title loan services.

At this Claymont location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and check-cashing services. Call +1 302-792-1254 to ask about rates, eligibility requirements, or to begin your application before visiting in person.

If you need quick cash in Claymont, DE, bring valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and banking information. Advance America processes applications quickly—many are funded same-day.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee identified. Loan costs vary by state and product; fees disclosed post-application.

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: Lower monthly payments than payday structure

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Borrow, repay, and re-borrow as needed

tiers.name: Title Loans (via LoanCenter)
features: Larger amounts than standard payday products

pros: One of the largest non-bank consumer lenders in the U.S. with 800–1,800+ storefront locations across 27–28 states
In-store cash disbursement in approximately 30 minutes for qualified applicants
Online applications available with same-day funding if approved before noon, or next business day
Loyalty rewards program lets repeat borrowers earn points for on-time payments, redeemable for fee discounts
Trustpilot rating of 4.9/5 — suggesting strong satisfaction among a core segment of customers
BBB A+ rating with accreditation since 2024 and a declining complaint trend (302 over 3 years, 74 in most recent 12 months)
Multiple product types (payday, installment, line of credit, title) allow some flexibility based on borrower need
cons: Payday loan APRs of 350%–688% are among the highest legally permitted — a $300 loan can cost $345+ if not repaid in two weeks
Even installment loans carry APRs of 143%–200%+, far exceeding alternatives like credit unions or personal loan lenders
BBB consumer review score of 1.7/5 (154 reviews) sharply contradicts the institutional A+ rating, indicating real customer friction
Only available in 27–28 states — residents of New York, Pennsylvania, and other regulated states cannot access products
No dedicated mobile app confirmed — account management is web-only, limiting convenience for mobile-first users
best_for: Consumers with no access to bank credit who need $100–$2,000 in cash within hours for a genuine emergency
Underbanked individuals in states where Advance America is licensed who need in-person service with immediate cash
Borrowers who have already exhausted credit card, family, and credit union options and need a same-day bridge
Repeat borrowers who can leverage the loyalty rewards program to reduce fees over time
diagnosis: Advance America is genuinely best for consumers in a financial emergency who have no access to traditional credit and need cash the same day — it is fast, widely available in-store, and has fewer eligibility barriers than banks. The central caveat is cost: APRs routinely exceed 400% on payday products, making these loans extremely expensive if not repaid on the original due date, and the 1.7/5 BBB customer review score suggests a meaningful share of borrowers experience problems with fees or collections.
services: Payday loans ($100–$2,000, due next paycheck, 7–30 days)
Vehicle title loans ($2,000–$25,000 via LoanCenter partner)
Online loan applications with next-business-day funding

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 2720 Philadelphia Pike, Claymont, DE. Same-day payday and title loans available.
